name: Support Pattern Detection
summary: Turn recent customer tickets into a concise, evidence-linked view of recurring problems, emerging spikes, severity, and the next action.
prerequisites: Connect a customer-support system with read access to tickets, such as Zendesk or Intercom.
Configure the analysis window, minimum pattern size, severity rules, exclusions, and delivery destination.
Meaningful trend comparisons require enough ticket volume and at least one prior matching time window.
Slack and an issue tracker are optional if you want reports delivered to a channel or escalations filed automatically.
